message:
refactor(deps): migrate fcp-bootstrap, fcp-testkit, fcp-telemetry from direct tokio to fcp-async-core

Continue the ASUPERSYNC tokio-prohibition migration by removing direct
tokio dependencies from three more crates:

- fcp-bootstrap: replace tokio main dep with fcp-async-core path dep;
  move tokio to dev-deps with minimal features (macros, rt-multi-thread)
- fcp-testkit: remove tokio and tokio-stream from deps entirely; relies
  solely on fcp-async-core
- fcp-telemetry: remove tokio.workspace = true entirely
- fcp-e2e: add twilio feature flag; reduce tokio features from
  [io-util, macros, process, rt, time] to [macros, rt]

Also alphabetize import ordering in slack integration tests,
llm_router compliance e2e, and testkit supervisor_examples to match
fcp-async-core canonical import style.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -28,9 +28,6 @@ opentelemetry-otlp = { version = "0.31", features = ["grpc-tonic", "trace"] }
 metrics = "0.24"
 metrics-exporter-prometheus = "0.18"
 
-# Async runtime
-tokio.workspace = true
-
 # Serialization
 serde.workspace = true
 serde_json.workspace = true

@@ -21,9 +21,7 @@ fcp-store = { path = "../fcp-store", optional = true }
 
 # Async runtime
 async-trait.workspace = true
-tokio = { workspace = true, features = ["sync", "time", "macros", "rt-multi-thread"] }
 futures-util.workspace = true
-tokio-stream.workspace = true
 
 # Serialization
 serde.workspace = true
